features.featureTitle: Remove all loading spinners, loading overlays, and loading state indicators from the iframe tab browsing experience. When a URL is loaded in a tab, the iframe must appear immediately with no loading screen, no spinner, and no in-progress visual state. This applies to TabBar.tsx (remove per-tab loading indicators), TabContent.tsx (remove the loading overlay/spinner shown while the iframe loads), and useTabs.ts (remove the isLoading/loading state tracking for tabs entirely or stop using it to gate rendering).
